title: Selectable Watches list
text: Selectable Watches list A list of items that can be added to the Watches pane of the Uniface Debugger. The listed items match the Scope and Functions . You select these items either by clicking Select all items or by normal mouse and keyboard actions. Click Deselect all items to undo the selection of items in the list. After you have selected the items you want to add to the Watches pane, click Add . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
